title: Lost in Starlight
tmdbOverview: When an astronaut leaves Earth for Mars, the vast infinite space divides star-crossed lovers in this animated romance that crosses the cosmos.
synopsis: Lost in Starlight (2025) is a animation, romance and science fiction film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
